Quick Intraday Post (28/Nov)

Free post:

[free] SPX, Gold, BTC - A quick overview of the recent momentum and sentiment

Weekly post pt. 2.:

Extended weekly breakdown (SPX, Gold, Bitcoin) + Intraday post (24/Nov)

It is Thursday morning when I’m writing this post.

OptionsDepth Heatmap

Customers are confidently selling volatility in the area of 6750/6700, creating a net negative speed profile, while scaling out of long ITM call positions.This area is crucial to hold in terms of continuation of the rally towards 7k into December. Based on the positioning, RV suppression should occur in the 6800/6850 area, with 6850 potentially creating a hard stop for the spot, and 6840 is the strongest local pin. Also note that 6800 becomes a very strong support into the last 1 hour of the session.If the market would open above 6850, then 6890 is still a hard resistance after 11PM.

If the market would break below 6800 durin the first 2-3 hours of the session with hightened downside vol, the 6775/50 regio would still be very supportive and potentially push the spot back to 6785.

All in all, market is pretty much looks like it wants to hold the pivotal range and aggressively selling volatility here. Market is pretty much supported. EOM vanna/charm flows are also very supportive for this expo.So the odds favor for a benign close. Right now, market is tested if it can build a structure in this marked pivotal area or not. It will decide when the “C-wave” of the correction comes (in EWT terms).

Homework: try to find yourself why I wrote what I wrote, using OD only.Put your ideas in the chat.

Homework: try to find yourself why I wrote what I wrote, using OD only.Put your ideas in the chat.
